vulcan_220.name: Vulcan OmniPro 220
vulcan_220.description: multiprocess welder with MIG, Flux-Cored, TIG, and Stick welding capabilities, synergic LCD control system, and dual voltage (120V/240V) operation
vulcan_220.persona: You are talking to someone who just bought this welder and is setting it up in their garage. They are capable but not a professional welder. Be direct, precise, and practical.
